message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame sort_index + values (4)

Append 4 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame sort operations:

- sort_index_ascending: shuffled int64 row index, ascending=True
- sort_index_descending: utf8 row index, ascending=False
- sort_values_ascending: by 'score' column, multi-col frame
- sort_values_descending: same setup, descending

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.sort_index() / frame.sort_values(by=col, kind="mergesort")),
runs the Rust DataFrame.sort_index(asc) / .sort_values(col, asc),
and asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameSortIndex
and DataFrameSortValues were already wired through the Frame response
branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-r6uzw]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
